name: Almond Dumplings (for Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks lightly.
2. Add salt, pepper, chopped parsley, minced almonds, and baking powder to the egg yolks. Mix in enough flour to create a very stiff batter.
3. Gradually add beaten egg whites to the mixture until well combined.
4. Test a small spoonful of the batter by dropping it into boiling water. If it dissolves or separates, add more flour.
5. Carefully drop spoonfuls of the batter into the boiling soup about 10 minutes before serving.
(Note: This recipe is from The Settlement Cookbook.)
